DISPUTED AND UNDISPUTED FACTS IN OPPOS TO DEFT'S STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALTERICH, SUZANNE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANNA'S LINENS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. -- AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - DENIED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF ARE OVERRULED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER DEFENDANT WAS AWARE OF THE AGGRESSIVE SOLICITATIONS AT THE LANDING OF DEFENDANT'S STORE AND IF THIS SOLICITATION CREATED A FORESEEABLE RISK OF HARM TO ITS PATRONS. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Continued To Nov-21-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ANNA'S LINENS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Brian L. Larsen, Esq. of Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen 398-5000 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); Kimberlei D. Evans, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP 438-6623 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - denied. Defendant's objections to declaration of plaintiff are overruled. There is a triable issue of material fact as to whether defendant was aware of the aggressive solicitations at the landing of defendant's store and if this solicitation created a foreseeable risk of harm to its patrons.
Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
